nodes.label: sanad-review-summary-2.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad app's Student View showing a completed Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) quiz session. The result card displays a thumbs-up emoji, 'انتهت الجلسة!' (Session ended!), a 50% score, 1 correct answer, 2 needing review, and a session duration of 2 minutes 15 seconds. Two action buttons are shown: 'العودة للمراجعة' (Return to Review) and 'جلسة جديدة' (New Session). The header includes a Student/Lawyer role switcher, language toggle (EN/AR), and the Sanad branding. Navigation tabs visible: Student Dashboard, Study Materials (5), Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (16), Cases Bank (6), Smart Review (active). Footer notes PWA is enabled and the app is optimized for a home server.

nodes.label: Review Session Complete Screen
nodes.description: UI state rendered by ReviewPanel when a quiz session ends. Shows score percentage, correct count, review count, elapsed time, and two action buttons. Motivational message in Arabic ('جيد! واصل التقدم.').

nodes.label: Student/Lawyer Role Switcher
nodes.description: Header UI control allowing the user to switch between Student (طالب) and Lawyer (محامي) roles, changing the view context in the Sanad app.
